description: A dessert made with sweetened strawberries layered with shortcake, biscuit, or sponge and usually whipped cream. The exact form varies by region and household tradition.
preparation_steps: Sweeten and macerate the strawberries so they release some juice.
Prepare or slice the shortcake or biscuit base.
Whip the cream if using fresh cream.
Assemble the dessert by layering cake, strawberries, and cream.

health_advice.benefits: Includes fruit and can be lighter than denser desserts when portions are modest.
health_advice.risks: Sugar content can be high, especially with sweetened cream and cake.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Use ripe fruit for flavor and reduce added sugar where possible.

dietary_notes.note: Traditional versions are vegetarian. Vegan and gluten-free versions are possible with suitable cream and cake substitutes.

allergens: Gluten in standard cake or biscuits
